events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the cal sheet's as-found/as-left pattern points to a span (gain) error rather than a simple zero offset, but the documentation doesn't confirm a span adjustment was made or that full multi-point as-left verification was performed — so the instrument reads compliant only at zero while remaining out of tolerance at higher range points. Called this a **fail**, `installed-defective`, medium risk, with corrective actions to re-adjust span, re-verify all test points, and clarify the FD+DOC record before return to service.
